userGroups.dailyValueTargetGroupName: Adults and children 4 or more years of age
userGroups.langualCodeDescription: Adults and Children 4 years and above

statements.notes:
• Supports Mouth and Throat Health
• Reduces Bad Breath*

SUGGESTED USAGE: As a dietary supplement, take 1 lozenge 1 to 4 times daily. Allow lozenge to dissolve slowly and completely in mouth and swallow. Consider taking this product in combination with NOW(R) Probiotic-10(TM), Olive Leaf Extract and XyliWhite(TM) Mouthwash.
Refrigerate after opening to maintain high potency.

NOW(R) OralBiotic(TM) contains the naturally occurring probiotic organism Streptococcus salivarius BLIS K12(R), which has been clinically shown to support oral and throat health.
Although it is not an antibiotic, OralBiotic(TM) BLIS K12(R) successfully colonizes the oral cavity at the expense of other bacteria, promoting oral health. It also helps to improve breath when used in conjunction with proper oral hygiene. Fructooligosaccharides (FOS) provide nutritional support for S. salivarius.*
Contains no salt, wheat, gluten, soy, egg, shellfish or preservatives.
This product is formulated with 2 Billion Bacteria at time of manufacture.
Keep refrigerated to maintain live bacteria counts.
BLIS K12(R) and the BLIS K12(R) logo are registered trademarks of BLIS Technologies.
Do Not Eat Freshness Packet. Keep in Bottle.
*These statements have not been evaluated by the FDA. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure or prevent any disease.
